overview: OMEGA SECURITY is an immersive futuristic AI security command dashboard with a fantasy cover art aesthetic. A glowing female AI face anchors the center, surrounded by seven animated defense panels, live threat counters, a world map with threat pings, a command interface, and a dramatic boot sequence — all rendered in vivid neon blue against deep dark backgrounds.
features: Dramatic INITIATE OMEGA boot sequence animation on first load
Central glowing AI face portrait with radiant halo animation
Seven animated defense panels: Firewall, Threat Detection, Mirror Decoy, Command Hierarchy, Auto-Defend, NNN Protocol, King's Eye
OMEGA STATUS BAR with live animated counters for uptime, shields, and threats
King's Eye SVG world map with clickable threat ping dots and tooltips
NNN Protocol DEPLOY VIRUS button with full-screen glitch animation
Command input box with pre-scripted dramatic OMEGA AI responses
Zero-Trust trust-score meter, Quantum Encryption qubit animation, Behavioral Anomaly live chart
Neon blue chiaroscuro aesthetic with glowing particles, scan lines, and pulsing effects
